title: Monilaria scutata
taxonomy: Monilaria scutata is a species of succulent plant, and it belongs to the family Aizoaceae. This family is commonly known as the 'stone plants' or 'mesembs'. The genus Monilaria is part of the subfamily Ruschioideae. The Aizoaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, with the Ruschioideae subfamily containing many succulent plants native to southern Africa. Monilaria scutata is native to South Africa, and it is often grown as an ornamental plant due to its unique appearance.
